query:
SELECT campaignId, COUNT(*) as lead_count, MIN(discoveredAt) as first_seen, MAX(discoveredAt) as last_seen
FROM outreach_leads
GROUP BY campaignId
ORDER BY lead_count DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:
